name: LC Tank Circuit — 1610 kHz
description: Parallel LC resonant circuit (tank) tuned to 1610 kHz (KLIX broadcast). L1=220µH, C1=100pF fixed, C_trim=50pF variable. Resonant frequency: f = 1/(2π√(LC)).
notes: Target: 1610 kHz. With L=220µH, C_total needed = 1/(4π²×f²×L) ≈ 44pF. Trimmer adjusts from ~100+50=150pF (lower freq) down to ~100pF (higher freq). Fine tune by ear. Q factor of Bojack DIP choke is modest — ferrite rod antenna would improve selectivity. This circuit is the front end of the AM receiver (sample 005).
